summary: Iteration 253 - Academy (Omni-Modality Learning System) Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). All academy endpoints working: GET /api/academy/modalities returns 4 modalities (architect, chef, researcher, voyager) with correct structure. GET /api/academy/modality returns user's current modality (default: architect). PATCH /api/academy/modality switches modality and returns new data. GET /api/academy/programs returns 3 programs (foundations, transmutation, sentinel_ops) with user progress and modality-skinned labels. GET /api/academy/lesson/{module_id} returns lesson content with sections and key concepts. POST /api/academy/begin starts a module and returns in_progress status. POST /api/academy/complete completes a lesson and awards dust + resonance points. POST /api/academy/complete for lab/test validates H² determinant (blocks if negative). GET /api/academy/forge/{program_id}/{module_id} returns forge simulation with 4×4 cluster matrix, cluster scores, H² state, and challenge tasks. GET /api/academy/accreditation returns mastery level with progress_to_next, modules_total (16), certifications. Frontend: Academy page loads with modality toggle (4 buttons), accreditation stats (323 RP, 70m Focus, 4/16 Modules, 0 Certs), mastery ring (Initiate tier), and 3 expandable programs. Modality toggle switches labels correctly (Architect: Quest Node/Forge Mini-Game/Boss Encounter, Chef: Prep List/Kitchen Lab/Final Service, Voyager: Frequency Map/Sound Geometry Lab/Resonance Trial). Clicking lesson module opens LessonViewer with step-through sections, progress dots, and Complete Lesson button. Clicking lab module opens ForgeLab modal with 4×4 H² matrix visualization, cluster state bars, determinant status (Det: Positive), simulation tasks with weights, validation rule, and Submit for Validation button. Completed modules show green styling. Programs are expandable/collapsible.
critical_code_review_comments: academy.py: MODALITIES dict defines 4 learning modes with xp_multiplier, labels, colors, icons
academy.py: LESSON_CONTENT dict has content for modules m1, m2, m4, t1, t2, t4, s1, s2
academy.py: FORGE_CHALLENGES dict has challenges for modules m3, m5, m6, t3, t5, t6, s3, s4
academy.py: PROGRAMS list defines 3 programs with 16 total modules (6+6+4)
academy.py: get_programs() applies modality skin to module display_label
academy.py: complete_module() validates H² determinant for labs/tests - blocks if <= 0
academy.py: complete_module() awards dust (resonance_points * 0.5) and updates accreditation_scores
academy.py: _issue_certification() generates fractal fingerprint from H² binary state
academy.py: _compute_mastery_level() has 6 tiers: Initiate, Apprentice, Journeyman, Master, Grand Master, Sovereign
academy.py: get_forge_lab() returns 4×4 cluster_matrix condensed from 24×24 H² tensor
AcademyPage.js: FractalCertificate component renders canvas-based fractal from seed parameters
AcademyPage.js: ForgeMatrix component renders animated 4×4 cluster matrix with determinant indicator
AcademyPage.js: MasteryRing component shows SVG progress ring with tier color
AcademyPage.js: LessonViewer component has step-through sections with progress dots
AcademyPage.js: ForgeLab component shows H² matrix, cluster scores, tasks, validation rule
ModalityContext.js: switchModality() calls PATCH /api/academy/modality and updates state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 253 verified Academy (Omni-Modality Learning System): (1) GET /api/academy/modalities returns 4 modalities with xp_multiplier, labels, colors. (2) GET /api/academy/modality returns user's current modality. (3) PATCH /api/academy/modality switches modality. (4) GET /api/academy/programs returns 3 programs (foundations, transmutation, sentinel_ops) with 16 total modules, user progress, and modality-skinned labels. (5) GET /api/academy/lesson/{module_id} returns lesson content with sections and key_concepts. (6) POST /api/academy/begin starts a module. (7) POST /api/academy/complete completes module, awards dust + resonance points, validates H² determinant for labs/tests. (8) GET /api/academy/forge/{program_id}/{module_id} returns forge simulation with 4×4 cluster_matrix, cluster_scores, h2_state, challenge tasks. (9) GET /api/academy/accreditation returns mastery_level with progress_to_next, modules_total (16), certifications. (10) Frontend: Academy page at /academy with modality toggle, accreditation stats, mastery ring, 3 expandable programs. (11) Modality toggle changes module labels dynamically. (12) LessonViewer modal opens for lesson modules with step-through sections. (13) ForgeLab modal opens for lab/test modules with H² matrix visualization, cluster state, determinant status, tasks. (14) Completed modules show green styling and are non-clickable. (15) Test user grad_test_522@test.com has 323 RP, 4/16 modules completed, Initiate tier.
